CE1.justification: Acted directly on the request, writing the entry without asking the user to load or restate anything.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but the final response stretches into parenthetical methodology justification and a promotion-pointer caveat beyond the terse minimum.

CE3.justification: Named the file (observations.md), explained why it was not promoted to decisions.md, and noted heading-form rationale in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Single append to one file with no orphaned scratch artifacts; an interruption would leave a coherent, self-contained entry.
